content:
cargo install wkg --version 0.16.0-rc.0
Huge list of changes, some highlights:

  • multi package publishing
  • workspaces (for fetch and pubish)
  • semver checks
  • dry runs
  • publish no-op (does not error if upstream version exists)

Complete patch notes here:
https://github.com/bytecodealliance/wasm-pkg-tools/releases/tag/v0.16.0-rc.0
